task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the WooCommerce 'Products -> Attributes' or 'Configure terms' page for the 'Color' attribute showing 'Black' added to the list of terms.

task_completion.description: Add the 'Black' color option to the 'Classic T-Shirt' product attributes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Edit Product' page for 'Classic T-Shirt'. In the 'Product data' section under the 'Attributes' tab, 'Black' should be visible in the 'Color' values box, and 'Used for variations' should be checked.

task_completion.description: Create a new variation for the 'Black' color.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Variations' tab in the 'Product data' section showing a new variation row specifically assigned to the 'Black' color.

task_completion.description: Set the SKU of the new Black variation to 'CTS-BLK'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the expanded details of the Black variation showing 'CTS-BLK' entered into the 'SKU' input field.

task_completion.description: Set the regular price of the new Black variation to $25.00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the expanded details of the Black variation showing '25.00' (or '25') entered into the 'Regular price' input field.

task_completion.description: Ensure the variation is enabled and the product is saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Enabled' checkbox being ticked in the Black variation details, and a 'Product updated' success message at the top of the screen after clicking the 'Update' button.

integrity.description: The agent used the WordPress/WooCommerce web GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the WordPress admin dashboard (wp-admin), not terminal windows using WP-CLI or database commands.

integrity.description: The agent edited the correct, existing product rather than creating a fake page.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL should show 'post.php?post=...&action=edit' and the page title should clearly be editing the 'Classic T-Shirt' product.

integrity.description: The agent did not alter the prices of the existing variations.
integrity.visual_evidence: If visible, the existing variations (e.g., Red, Blue) should still show their original base price of $20.00.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target product is 'Classic T-Shirt'. The new color to be added globally and to the product is 'Black'. The new variation must have the SKU 'CTS-BLK' and a regular price of $25.00. Existing variations (e.g., Red, Blue) have a base price of $20.00.
